# PERF-186 positive: strings.Fields inside a request handler
lang: go
file: PERF-186-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	tags := r.URL.Query().Get("tags")
	parts := strings.Fields(tags)
	_ = parts
	w.WriteHeader(200)
}
